class.name: GDKResult
class.description: Returned by GDK API calls to indicate success or failure. Check [member ok] for success. On failure, [member code] contains a machine-readable error code, [member message] contains a human-readable description, and [member hresult] contains the native HRESULT value.

method.name: get_hresult
method.description: Returns the native HRESULT value from the GDK operation.

method.name: get_code
method.description: Returns a machine-readable error code string.

method.name: get_data
method.description: Returns additional data associated with the result, if any.

members.member: The native HRESULT value from the GDK operation.
Additional data associated with the result, if any.
